title: On Reports Results for Q2 2024
text: On Holding AG reported Q2 2024 net sales of CHF 567.7 million, up 27.8% year-over-year (29.4% constant currency). Gross profit margin improved to 59.9% from 59.5% in the prior year. Net income reached CHF 30.8 million versus CHF 3.3 million prior year. Adjusted EBITDA reached CHF 90.8 million, up 44.7%. For the six-month period, net sales were CHF 1,075.9 million, up 24.4% (29.3% constant currency). Regional highlights included Asia-Pacific growing 73.7% and apparel sales jumping 63.0%. DTC channel sales increased 28.1% to CHF 209.4 million, while wholesale grew 27.6% to CHF 358.2 million. On maintained full-year 2024 targets: at least 30% constant currency growth, approximately CHF 2.26 billion in reported net sales, 60% gross margin, and adjusted EBITDA margin of 16.0-16.5%. Strategic initiatives included the LightSpray technology launch and partnership with Zendaya.
